title: Inspect and monitor culturally significant places
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect and monitor culturally significant places demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for inspection

pcs.text: Determine significance of place from cultural and/or heritage management plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine significance of place from cultural and/or heritage management plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine significance of place from cultural and/or heritage management plans.

pcs.text: Determine specific facilities and equipment required for inspection according to operational request
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine specific facilities and equipment required for inspection according to operational request?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine specific facilities and equipment required for inspection according to operational request.

pcs.text: Obtain charters and specifications for evaluating the condition of cultural place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain charters and specifications for evaluating the condition of cultural place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain charters and specifications for evaluating the condition of cultural place.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for inspection

elements.title: Carry out comprehensive inspection

pcs.text: Follow work health and safety policies and procedures for carrying out inspections
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow work health and safety policies and procedures for carrying out inspections?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow work health and safety policies and procedures for carrying out inspections.

pcs.text: Inspect condition of cultural place for deterioration and damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect condition of cultural place for deterioration and damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect condition of cultural place for deterioration and damage.

pcs.text: Assess and record non-conformity with conservation and management plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record non-conformity with conservation and management plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record non-conformity with conservation and management plans.

pcs.text: Evaluate deterioration and damage to the cultural place to determine impact on the significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate deterioration and damage to the cultural place to determine impact on the significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate deterioration and damage to the cultural place to determine impact on the significance.

pcs.text: Determine threats to cultural place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine threats to cultural place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine threats to cultural place.

pcs.text: Determine and schedule maintenance works for the cultural place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and schedule maintenance works for the cultural place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and schedule maintenance works for the cultural place.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards, assess risk, and document controls for cultural place according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards, assess risk, and document controls for cultural place according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards, assess risk, and document controls for cultural place according to workplace safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out comprehensive inspection

elements.title: Submit report and recommendations

pcs.text: Action urgent substandard cultural conditions in accordance with conservation management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Action urgent substandard cultural conditions in accordance with conservation management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Action urgent substandard cultural conditions in accordance with conservation management plan.

pcs.text: Document inspection into a draft report and submit to stakeholders for feedback
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document inspection into a draft report and submit to stakeholders for feedback?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document inspection into a draft report and submit to stakeholders for feedback.

pcs.text: Review frequency and scope of inspection requirements in management systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review frequency and scope of inspection requirements in management systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review frequency and scope of inspection requirements in management systems.

pcs.text: Develop recommendations for future action according to conservation management plan, industry best practice, legislative requirements and international environmental standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop recommendations for future action according to conservation management plan, industry best practice, legislative requirements and international environmental standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop recommendations for future action according to conservation management plan, industry best practice, legislative requirements and international environmental standards.

pcs.text: Prepare final report incorporating feedback and recommendations, and submit to management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare final report incorporating feedback and recommendations, and submit to management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare final report incorporating feedback and recommendations, and submit to management.

pcs.text: Update information management system with inspection results according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Update information management system with inspection results according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Update information management system with inspection results according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Submit report and recommendations

elements.title: Monitor cultural area and surrounds

pcs.text: Monitor cultural area for deterioration and damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor cultural area for deterioration and damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor cultural area for deterioration and damage.

pcs.text: Determine the short-term and long-term deterioration and impact on the significance of cultural place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the short-term and long-term deterioration and impact on the significance of cultural place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the short-term and long-term deterioration and impact on the significance of cultural place.

pcs.text: Plan required restoration or modification of potential deterioration of the cultural area and surrounds
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan required restoration or modification of potential deterioration of the cultural area and surrounds?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan required restoration or modification of potential deterioration of the cultural area and surrounds.

pcs.text: Integrate maintenance, restoration and modification of cultural place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Integrate maintenance, restoration and modification of cultural place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Integrate maintenance, restoration and modification of cultural place.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Monitor cultural area and surrounds

elements.title: Monitor stakeholder views on significance

pcs.text: Seek feedback from stakeholders on the significance and maintenance of cultural place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek feedback from stakeholders on the significance and maintenance of cultural place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek feedback from stakeholders on the significance and maintenance of cultural place.

pcs.text: Review feedback and record stakeholder views on significance and maintenance of cultural place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review feedback and record stakeholder views on significance and maintenance of cultural place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review feedback and record stakeholder views on significance and maintenance of cultural place.

pcs.text: Report assessment of changed views to workplace, charter processes and Indigenous places guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report assessment of changed views to workplace, charter processes and Indigenous places guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report assessment of changed views to workplace, charter processes and Indigenous places guidelines.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Monitor stakeholder views on significance

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
